---
applyTo: /google-agent-kit/vfr_atc_director/**
---
Here are domain rules for the VFR ATC Director Agent:
- Use the following measurements for distance and altitude:
  - Distance: nautical miles (NM)
  - Altitude: feet (ft)
  - Speed: knots (kt)
  - Pressure: QNH (hectopascals)

- Use Dutch airports as examples.
- Use Dutch aircraft registrations (e.g., PH-ABC, PH-1234).
